project.name: hippo
project.description: Hippo is a local-first knowledge-capture daemon for macOS that watches shell activity, Claude Code sessions, and Firefox browsing, redacts known secret formats, and enriches events with a local LLM to build a searchable, fully local second brain. A Rust daemon captures and stores events in SQLite, a Python brain handles enrichment/embeddings and exposes RAG via an MCP server, with a Swift GUI and an Astro marketing site rounding out the project. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

nodes.name: extension.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that typechecks and builds the Firefox WebExtension on Ubuntu and macOS whenever extension/firefox sources change.

nodes.name: gui.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs Swift tests and packages the HippoGUI release app on a macOS runner, stamping the workspace version from Cargo.toml.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an inline Python heredoc to extract the workspace version from Cargo.toml for the marketing-version env var.

nodes.name: python.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that lints (ruff), format-checks, and runs the hippo-brain pytest suite with coverage on Ubuntu and macOS when brain/ sources change.
nodes.languageNotes: Stamps a dev version into brain/src/hippo_brain/_version.py from git describe before running tests.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions release workflow triggered by v*.*.* tags that builds, strips, and checksums the aarch64-apple-darwin hippo daemon binary and publishes release artifacts.
nodes.languageNotes: Tag-driven release pipeline producing macOS arm64 artifacts with derived checksums.

nodes.name: rust.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that format-checks, builds, clippy-lints, tests, and audits the Rust daemon and core crates on Ubuntu and macOS when crates/ or Cargo manifests change.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Swatinem/rust-cache with per-OS shared keys and cargo-audit for dependency CVE scanning.

nodes.name: security.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions security-guardrails workflow that scans shell scripts for secret-leakage patterns via scripts/security/check-shell-secrets.sh on both Ubuntu and macOS.

nodes.name: site-ci.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the Astro documentation site and runs Astro check, Vitest, non-blocking link checking, and axe-core accessibility smoke tests on pull requests.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pnpm with frozen lockfile and caches Astro/Pagefind output; a11y and link checks are continue-on-error.

nodes.name: site-deploy.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and deploys the Astro site to GitHub Pages on pushes to main and a daily cron, keeping changelog and status pages fresh.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a non-cancelling 'pages' concurrency group to avoid inconsistent GitHub Pages state on concurrent deploys.

nodes.name: .semgrep.yml
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule set encoding hippo's capture-reliability contract, flagging silent Result/Option swallowing and other patterns that historically caused silent data loss across the crates/ and brain/ capture layer.
nodes.languageNotes: Rules are scoped tightly to capture paths so non-capture code can keep using the flagged idioms harmlessly.

nodes.name: .sqlfluff
nodes.summary: SQLFluff linter/formatter configuration pinning the SQLite dialect, 4-space indentation, and relaxed wrapping rules to keep CREATE TABLE DDL compact.
nodes.languageNotes: INI-format config; classified as code in the manifest but is actually a tool configuration file.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent-facing guide summarizing hippo's project structure, the canonical mise workflow, Rust and Python commands, architecture, and data storage conventions.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Primary project memory for Claude covering hippo's structure, build/test commands, path conventions, two-process architecture, and the browser/Claude/Codex/capture-reliability subsystems.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor guide describing the project shape, setup, test strategy, dev loop, cross-language coupling, CI behavior, formatting/linting, code-review expectations, and PR/release conventions.

nodes.name: IMPL_NOTES.md
nodes.summary: Implementation notes for issue #108 documenting the env-var bucketing probe, interpretation, and the chosen resolution for RAG entity surfacing.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level project README covering hippo's value proposition, quick install, architecture, prerequisites, manual installation, usage, troubleshooting, MCP server, Firefox extension, configuration, privacy, and development.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: hippo-brain package README covering setup, running, testing, linting, the MCP server, the brain's modules, and its HTTP API.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Rust workspace manifest defining the hippo-core and hippo-daemon members, the shared package version (0.26.1, edition 2024, MIT), and workspace-wide dependencies including tokio, rusqlite, clap, and OpenTelemetry.
nodes.languageNotes: Cargo workspace with resolver 2 and centralized workspace.dependencies inherited by member crates.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: hippo-brain Python project manifest declaring runtime dependencies (httpx, mcp, sqlite-vec, uvicorn, OpenTelemetry), dev tooling, console-script entry points (hippo-brain/hippo-mcp/hippo-eval/hippo-bench), and ruff/pytest/coverage configuration.
nodes.languageNotes: Targets Python 3.14, uses hatchling build backend, and enforces 82% coverage gate with ruff py314 target.

nodes.name: eval_questions.json
nodes.summary: Labeled evaluation-question fixture dataset used to benchmark the brain's RAG retrieval and answer quality, with schema metadata and a questions array.

nodes.name: backfill-git-repo.py
nodes.summary: One-off maintenance script that backfills the git_repo column on historical shell events by resolving each event's cwd to an owner/repo slug via git remotes.
nodes.languageNotes: Groups events by cwd to amortize git subprocess calls; supports --dry-run for safe inspection.

nodes.name: parse_owner_repo
nodes.summary: Parses a git remote URL (SSH or HTTPS form) into a normalized owner/repo slug, stripping the .git suffix and host prefixes.

nodes.name: resolve_git_repo
nodes.summary: Resolves a working directory to its git owner/repo slug by querying the origin remote, falling back to the toplevel directory name.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main backfill routine that loads events with null git_repo, resolves each unique cwd to a slug, and bulk-updates the events table unless running dry.

nodes.name: dedup-entities.py
nodes.summary: Maintenance script that canonicalizes and merges duplicate entity rows by recomputing display names and folding equivalent entities into a single canonical record.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core dedup routine that groups entities by canonical key, plans merges and rebrands, then applies them within a transaction with dry-run support.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that parses arguments, opens the SQLite database, and invokes the dedup run with the requested options.

nodes.name: migrate-v5-to-v6.py
nodes.summary: Phased schema-v5-to-v6 migration tool that preflights and backs up the database, applies forward DDL, cleans queues and noise nodes, re-embeds, backfills git repos, dedups entities, and verifies with a synthetic round-trip.
nodes.languageNotes: Structured into idempotent phases with structured JSON-line logging and per-phase skip flags.

nodes.name: phase_preflight
nodes.summary: Migration preflight phase that checks the current schema version, ensures the daemon is stopped, and creates and integrity-verifies a timestamped database backup.

nodes.name: phase_schema_forward
nodes.summary: Applies the forward schema DDL script and verifies row counts and FTS integrity after the v6 migration.

nodes.name: phase_queue_cleanup
nodes.summary: Cleans up stale and failed enrichment-queue rows and reaps stale locks across the queue tables during migration.

nodes.name: phase_noise_cleanup
nodes.summary: Identifies and deletes noise knowledge nodes (whose backing events are no longer enrichment-eligible) with guardrails against extreme deletion.

nodes.name: phase_verify
nodes.summary: Post-migration verification phase asserting node/vector/FTS row alignment and running a synthetic insert-search-delete round-trip.

nodes.name: _synthetic_round_trip
nodes.summary: Inserts a synthetic knowledge node with vector and FTS rows, confirms it is searchable, then cleans it up to validate the vec0/FTS pipeline end-to-end.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Migration entry point that parses args, configures logging, opens the database, and sequences the migration phases with per-phase skip handling and error recovery.

nodes.name: _JsonLineHandler
nodes.summary: Logging handler that emits each migration log record as a structured JSON line to a file stream for machine-readable audit trails.

nodes.name: migrate-vectors.py
nodes.summary: Maintenance script that backfills missing knowledge-vector rows by re-embedding knowledge nodes that lack a vector, using the configured inference embedding model.

nodes.name: _load_models
nodes.summary: Loads inference base URL and embedding model name from config.toml, raising if the models table is missing.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Async routine that selects knowledge nodes missing a vector and embeds each via the InferenceClient, logging successes and warnings.

nodes.name: re-enrich-knowledge-nodes.py
nodes.summary: Maintenance script that re-runs LLM enrichment over existing knowledge nodes in place, rebuilding summaries, entities, and embeddings for selected sources.
nodes.languageNotes: Async pipeline with retry-wrapped LLM calls and rate-limited concurrency over candidate nodes.

nodes.name: _select_candidate_nodes
nodes.summary: Builds and executes a UNION query selecting candidate knowledge nodes to re-enrich, filtered by source and ordered newest- or oldest-first.

nodes.name: _call_llm_with_retries
nodes.summary: Calls the chat LLM to produce an enrichment result, retrying on transient failures and parsing the response into structured fields.

nodes.name: _update_node_in_place
nodes.summary: Writes a re-enrichment result back onto an existing knowledge node and upserts its entities within a single transaction, rolling back on error.

nodes.name: _re_embed
nodes.summary: Re-embeds a knowledge node's updated text and replaces its stored vector via the inference client.

nodes.name: _process_node
nodes.summary: Processes one candidate node end to end: fetches backing rows, builds the prompt, calls the LLM, updates the node, and re-embeds it.

nodes.name: main_async
nodes.summary: Async driver that loads settings, selects candidates, constructs the inference client, and processes nodes with rate-limited sleeps between batches.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that parses re-enrichment arguments and runs the async driver, exiting with its status.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: hippo-brain package root that loads runtime settings from config.toml, initializes telemetry, and launches the brain HTTP query server via uvicorn.
nodes.languageNotes: Python package barrel that doubles as the hippo-brain console-script main.

nodes.name: _load_runtime_settings
nodes.summary: Reads config.toml and assembles the brain's runtime settings dict (storage, inference, models, telemetry, browser, reaper), falling back to defaults when config is absent.

nodes.name: _default_settings
nodes.summary: Returns the default runtime settings dict used when no config.toml is present, anchored on XDG home paths.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Console-script entry point that parses CLI args, loads settings, optionally initializes OpenTelemetry, creates the app, and serves it with uvicorn.

nodes.name: schema_v5_min.sql
nodes.summary: Minimal SQLite schema fixture (v5) defining the knowledge_nodes plus the CI-knowledge tables (workflow_runs/jobs/annotations, lessons, lesson_pending) used as a lightweight test/bench database baseline.
nodes.languageNotes: Pared-down schema snapshot mirroring the production v5 migration; tables carry created_at/updated_at audit columns in Unix epoch ms.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive operator and developer guide for hippo-bench: a local enrichment-model shakeout benchmark that compares candidate LLMs against a frozen redacted corpus, with CLI reference, JSONL output schema, module map, and veracity caveats.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package marker for the hippo-bench benchmarking subsystem; exposes the bench module namespace.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Argparse entrypoint for the hippo-bench CLI, wiring subcommands (corpus init/verify/add-adversarial, run, summary, determinism, recover) to their implementations with defined exit-code semantics.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Defines the BenchConfig dataclass and DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS that parameterize a benchmark run (candidate models, self-consistency counts, latency ceiling, gate thresholds, sampling intervals).

nodes.name: coordinator.py
nodes.summary: Drives the per-model benchmark lifecycle: spawns the shadow stack, runs the self-consistency pass, drains the enrichment queue, executes the downstream-proxy retrieval pass, samples system metrics, and assembles a ModelRunResult.

nodes.name: corpus.py
nodes.summary: Builds the frozen benchmark corpus by time-bucketed sampling of the live hippo DB, redacting content, and emitting a shadow SQLite snapshot, JSONL sidecar, and manifest with content hashes for reproducibility.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of dataclasses (CorpusEntry, _SourceSpec, _SampledRow) and per-source SQL templating; SHA-256 hashing pins corpus content for determinism.

nodes.name: determinism.py
nodes.summary: Implements BT-29 determinism checking by extracting MRR/Hit@1 metrics from multiple run JSONLs and comparing per-model deltas against configured budgets to produce a DeterminismReport.

nodes.name: downstream_proxy.py
nodes.summary: Scores retrieval quality of enriched data: loads Q/A items, runs hybrid/semantic/lexical search, computes Hit@K, MRR and NDCG per mode, and samples ask-synthesis answers.

nodes.name: enrich_call.py
nodes.summary: HTTP client for the local LM Studio inference server that issues enrichment and embedding calls, measuring latency and classifying failures into a CallResult instead of raising.

nodes.name: gates.py
nodes.summary: Pure, deterministic per-attempt gate functions that score a model's enrichment output: schema validity, refusal/pathology detection, entity-type sanity, and self-consistency via pairwise cosine similarity.
nodes.languageNotes: Gate functions are designed never to raise — they return result dataclasses so a single bad model output cannot abort a run.

nodes.name: lms.py
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper around the LM Studio `lms` CLI for listing, loading, and unloading models, raising LmsUnavailable/LmsError on missing CLI or command failure.

nodes.name: metrics.py
nodes.summary: Background MetricsSampler thread that periodically samples the inference process RSS/CPU and host load/memory into Snapshot records, exposing latest and peak values for a model's active window.

nodes.name: orchestrate.py
nodes.summary: Top-level benchmark orchestrator that runs preflight checks, pauses/resumes the prod brain, loops over candidate models invoking the coordinator, and writes the run manifest and per-model records to the JSONL output.

nodes.name: output.py
nodes.summary: Defines the JSONL record dataclasses (run_manifest, attempt, model_summary, run_end) and an append-only RunWriter that serializes a benchmark run to a single .jsonl file.

nodes.name: paths.py
nodes.summary: XDG path resolution helpers for hippo-bench fixtures and run artifacts, keeping bench data in a sibling directory of the prod data dir rather than a child.

nodes.name: pause_rpc.py
nodes.summary: Thin HTTP client (PauseRpcClient) for the prod brain's /control/pause and /control/resume endpoints, with atomic lockfile writing and stale-pause recovery.

nodes.name: preflight.py
nodes.summary: Pre-flight check suite that verifies the inference server, prod brain reachability/pauseability, corpus presence, disk space, and a free brain port before a benchmark run starts.

nodes.name: pretty.py
nodes.summary: Text-table renderer for the `hippo-bench summary` command, formatting per-model gate results and durations from a run JSONL into human-readable output.

nodes.name: prod_config.py
nodes.summary: Resolves the production brain's port and base URL from ~/.config/hippo/config.toml so the bench can coordinate pause/resume with the live brain.

nodes.name: qa_seed.py
nodes.summary: One-shot script that seeds the eval-qa-v1.jsonl evaluation fixture by copying the committed Q/A template into the bench fixtures directory.

nodes.name: qa_template.jsonl
nodes.summary: Committed Q/A evaluation template (one JSON object per line) used as the seed corpus for downstream-proxy retrieval scoring in hippo-bench.
nodes.languageNotes: JSON Lines format; copied verbatim into the fixtures dir by qa_seed.py to become eval-qa-v1.jsonl.

nodes.name: runner.py
nodes.summary: Executes the self-consistency pass for a model — issuing repeated enrichment calls per event, composing per-attempt gate results, and building AttemptRecords with system snapshots.

nodes.name: schemas.py
nodes.summary: Defines the per-source enrichment JSON schemas (shell/claude/browser/workflow) via the SourceSchema dataclass and validates parsed model output against the expected contract.

nodes.name: shadow_stack.py
nodes.summary: Spawns and tears down an isolated shadow stack (daemon + brain) in its own process group with injected env and config, then waits for brain readiness — providing a production-shaped enrichment pipeline for each benchmarked model.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses POSIX process groups for clean SIGTERM/SIGKILL teardown of the spawned daemon+brain pair, and a temp dir for shadow config/logs.

nodes.name: _cmd_corpus_init
nodes.summary: Handles the `corpus init` subcommand: resolves corpus paths, runs init_corpus to sample and freeze the corpus, and prints a summary of the generated artifacts.

nodes.name: _init_overlay_db
nodes.summary: Creates and initializes the adversarial-events overlay SQLite database used to layer hand-crafted edge cases on top of the sampled corpus.

nodes.name: _cmd_corpus_add_adversarial
nodes.summary: Handles the `corpus add-adversarial` subcommand: pulls referenced events from the prod DB, redacts them, and inserts them into the adversarial overlay database.

nodes.name: _cmd_run
nodes.summary: Handles the `run` subcommand: parses model list and run options and invokes the top-level orchestrate_run.

nodes.name: _cmd_determinism
nodes.summary: Handles the `determinism` subcommand: compares multiple run JSONLs against MRR/Hit@1 budgets via compare_runs and reports the determinism verdict.

nodes.name: _build_parser
nodes.summary: Constructs the full argparse parser with all hippo-bench subcommands, flags, and defaults.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entrypoint that builds the parser, dispatches the chosen subcommand, and returns its exit code.

nodes.name: BenchConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding all tunable parameters for a benchmark run — candidate models, self-consistency counts, latency ceiling, gate thresholds, fixture/output paths, and sampling intervals — with a to_dict serializer.

nodes.name: ModelRunResult
nodes.summary: Result dataclass aggregating everything produced for one benchmarked model: attempts, per-event vectors, peak metrics, wall-clock timings, downstream-proxy scores, and error/restart flags.

nodes.name: _wait_for_queue_drain
nodes.summary: Polls the shadow bench DB enrichment queue until it drains or a timeout elapses, signalling when the brain has finished enriching the corpus.

nodes.name: _collect_event_ids_from_db
nodes.summary: Reads the set of event IDs present in the shadow bench database to correlate enrichment outputs back to corpus entries.

nodes.name: run_one_model
nodes.summary: Runs the complete benchmark lifecycle for a single model: spawns the shadow stack, optionally pauses prod, runs self-consistency and queue drain, executes the downstream-proxy pass, captures peak metrics, and returns a ModelRunResult.

nodes.name: CorpusEntry
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing one redacted corpus event with its source, content, reference enrichment, and content SHA-256, plus JSON-line serialization.

nodes.name: sample_from_hippo_db
nodes.summary: Time-bucketed sampler that draws a balanced set of shell/claude/browser/workflow events from the live hippo DB across day buckets, honoring per-source minimums and a deterministic seed.

nodes.name: write_corpus_sqlite
nodes.summary: Writes sampled corpus entries and their source rows into a fresh shadow SQLite database at the target schema version, ready to drive the shadow stack.

nodes.name: init_corpus
nodes.summary: End-to-end corpus initialization: samples from the hippo DB, writes the shadow SQLite snapshot, JSONL sidecar, and manifest with content hashes, refusing to overwrite unless forced.

nodes.name: verify_corpus
nodes.summary: Verifies corpus integrity by cross-checking event IDs and content hashes across the SQLite snapshot, JSONL sidecar, and manifest.

nodes.name: load_corpus
nodes.summary: Loads a frozen corpus fixture from a JSONL path into CorpusEntry objects for use by a benchmark run.

nodes.name: ModelDelta
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing the spread of MRR/Hit@1 across repeated runs of one model and whether the deltas pass the configured budget.

nodes.name: DeterminismReport
nodes.summary: Aggregate determinism report over multiple runs that exposes an overall pass/fail verdict and renders a human-readable comparison table.

nodes.name: compare_runs
nodes.summary: Compares MRR and Hit@1 metrics across a set of run JSONLs against per-metric budgets and assembles a DeterminismReport.

nodes.name: _extract_metrics
nodes.summary: Parses a single run JSONL to extract per-model MRR/Hit@1 metrics for determinism comparison.

nodes.name: load_qa_items
nodes.summary: Loads Q/A evaluation items from the fixture, restricting them to questions whose golden event IDs exist in the current corpus.

nodes.name: score_single_retrieval
nodes.summary: Scores one retrieval result set against the golden event ID, computing Hit@K and reciprocal-rank style signals for the configured k values.

nodes.name: run_downstream_proxy_pass
nodes.summary: Runs the full downstream retrieval-proxy pass over all Q/A items in each search mode (hybrid/semantic/lexical) and aggregates Hit@K, MRR and NDCG metrics.

nodes.name: run_ask_synthesis_sample
nodes.summary: Samples a subset of Q/A items and runs the ask-synthesis function on each to capture example synthesized answers for qualitative review.

nodes.name: CallResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing the outcome of an inference call: raw output, TTFT/total latency, and timeout/error classification.

nodes.name: call_enrichment
nodes.summary: Issues a single enrichment request to the local inference server for a payload/source, timing the call and returning a CallResult with classified errors rather than raising.

nodes.name: check_schema_validity
nodes.summary: Gate that strips code fences, extracts the JSON object from raw model output, and validates it against the per-source schema, returning a SchemaCheckResult.

nodes.name: check_refusal_pathology
nodes.summary: Gate that detects refusal phrases, trivial summaries, and echo-of-input pathology by comparing model output to the input via character n-gram Jaccard similarity.

nodes.name: check_entity_sanity
nodes.summary: Gate applying heuristic checks to extracted entity categories (files look like paths, tools/projects look sane) and returning per-category pass rates.

nodes.name: self_consistency_score
nodes.summary: Computes the self-consistency score for a model as the mean pairwise cosine similarity of repeated-run embedding vectors per event.

nodes.name: mean_pairwise_cosine
nodes.summary: Helper computing the mean cosine similarity over all unique pairs in a set of embedding vectors.

nodes.name: list_loaded
nodes.summary: Invokes the `lms` CLI to list currently loaded LM Studio models and parses the result.

nodes.name: MetricsSampler
nodes.summary: Background thread that discovers the inference process and samples its RSS/CPU plus host load/memory at a fixed interval, exposing latest and peak Snapshots for a model's active window.

nodes.name: orchestrate_run
nodes.summary: Top-level run driver: executes preflight, pauses the prod brain, loops candidate models through run_one_model, writes manifest/attempt/summary/end records, and resumes the prod brain on exit.

nodes.name: RunWriter
nodes.summary: Append-only JSONL writer with a context-manager interface that serializes manifest, attempt, model-summary, and run-end records for one benchmark run.

nodes.name: RunManifestRecord
nodes.summary: Dataclass for the run_manifest JSONL line capturing run identity, host info, preflight results, candidate models, corpus/schema versions, and gate thresholds.

nodes.name: AttemptRecord
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a single attempt JSONL line recording model, event, attempt index, timestamps, raw/parsed output, gate results, and a system snapshot.

nodes.name: ModelSummaryRecord
nodes.summary: Dataclass for the model_summary JSONL line aggregating per-model gate results, peak system metrics, tier-0 verdict, and downstream-proxy scores.

nodes.name: PauseRpcClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client that probes prod brain health and calls its /control/pause and /control/resume endpoints so the bench can quiesce the live brain during a run.

nodes.name: recover_stale_pause
nodes.summary: Detects a leftover pause lockfile from a crashed bench run and resumes the prod brain to recover from a stale paused state.

nodes.name: check_prod_brain_pauseable
nodes.summary: Preflight check that verifies the prod brain exposes a working pause/resume control endpoint before the bench attempts to quiesce it.

nodes.name: check_corpus_present
nodes.summary: Preflight check confirming the corpus SQLite snapshot and manifest exist and are internally consistent before a run starts.

nodes.name: check_brain_port_free
nodes.summary: Preflight check ensuring the port the shadow brain will bind is free, surfacing any conflicting process.

nodes.name: run_all_preflight
nodes.summary: Runs the full preflight suite (inference, prod brain, corpus, disk, brain port) and aggregates the CheckResults that gate whether a benchmark run may proceed.

nodes.name: render_summary_text
nodes.summary: Renders a human-readable text table summarizing per-model gate results and durations from a benchmark run JSONL.

nodes.name: resolve_prod_brain_port
nodes.summary: Reads ~/.config/hippo/config.toml to resolve the production brain's listening port, falling back to a default when unset.

nodes.name: _compute_gates
nodes.summary: Composes the per-attempt gate results (schema validity, refusal pathology, entity sanity) for one enrichment call result and corpus entry.

nodes.name: run_self_consistency_pass
nodes.summary: Runs N enrichment calls per event for a model, computes gates and embeddings per attempt, and emits AttemptRecords plus per-event vectors for self-consistency scoring.

nodes.name: _build_attempt
nodes.summary: Assembles an AttemptRecord from a call result, computed gates, parsed output, and system snapshot with timing metadata.

nodes.name: validate_against_schema
nodes.summary: Validates a parsed enrichment payload against the SourceSchema for its source, checking required keys, entity categories, enum constraints, and summary length.

nodes.name: SourceSchema
nodes.summary: Dataclass describing the expected enrichment JSON contract for a source: required top-level keys, entity categories, constrained enums, and summary length bounds.

nodes.name: ShadowStack
nodes.summary: Dataclass handle for a spawned shadow stack holding the daemon/brain process objects, process group id, brain base URL, run tree, and temp dir.

nodes.name: _spawn_pgrp_pair
nodes.summary: Spawns the daemon and brain as a single POSIX process group with redirected logs so the pair can be torn down atomically.

nodes.name: spawn_shadow_stack
nodes.summary: Builds the env and shadow config, spawns the daemon+brain process-group pair against the corpus DB, and returns a ShadowStack handle.

nodes.name: wait_for_brain_ready
nodes.summary: Polls the shadow brain's health endpoint until it reports ready or a timeout elapses.

nodes.name: teardown_shadow_stack
nodes.summary: Tears down the shadow stack by sending SIGTERM then SIGKILL to the process group after a timeout, cleaning up the temp dir.

nodes.name: summary.py
nodes.summary: Aggregates per-model benchmark attempt records into a summary row (percentiles, means, self-consistency) and computes a pass/fail verdict against configured gate thresholds.

nodes.name: browser_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Enrichment pipeline for Firefox browser-capture events: claims pending rows from the browser queue, chunks them by time gap, builds the LLM prompt, and writes browser knowledge nodes (also supplies browser context for shell-event prompts).

nodes.name: claude_sessions.py
nodes.summary: Parses Claude Code session JSONL transcripts into task-boundary segments, manages the claude_sessions/claude_enrichment_queue tables, and enriches claimed segments into knowledge nodes.

nodes.name: client.py
nodes.summary: Vendor-neutral HTTP client for an OpenAI-compatible local inference server, providing chat, embeddings, model listing and health checks, plus a deterministic MockInferenceClient for tests.

nodes.name: embeddings.py
nodes.summary: Embedding orchestration over the sqlite-vec vector store: opens the vector DB, embeds knowledge nodes (with dimension checks and pad/truncate), and runs similarity search.

nodes.name: enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Core shell-event enrichment logic: eligibility filtering, session-scoped queue claiming, prompt construction, LLM response parsing, entity upserts, and knowledge-node writes shared across sources.

nodes.name: entity_resolver.py
nodes.summary: Canonicalizes extracted entities (especially file/path types) by stripping git-worktree prefixes and resolving them against configured or auto-detected project roots.

nodes.name: evaluation.py
nodes.summary: Standalone RAG/retrieval evaluation harness: defines IR metrics (recall@k, MRR, nDCG, groundedness, cohesion), scores a question set against the live store, and renders a Markdown report.

nodes.name: lessons.py
nodes.summary: Upserts CI-failure 'lesson' clusters keyed by (repo, tool, rule_id, path_prefix), incrementing occurrence counts and synthesizing summaries once a minimum-occurrence threshold is reached.

nodes.name: mcp.py
nodes.summary: FastMCP server exposing hippo's knowledge base as MCP tools (ask, search_knowledge, search_events, get_entities, get_ci_status, get_lessons, etc.) backed by the retrieval and RAG layers.

nodes.name: mcp_logging.py
nodes.summary: Configures stderr logging for the MCP server so stdout stays reserved for the MCP stdio transport.

nodes.name: mcp_queries.py
nodes.summary: Pure SQL query implementations backing the MCP tools: lexical knowledge search, per-source event search (shell/claude/browser), entity listing, project listing, CI status, and lessons lookups.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Dataclass schemas for enrichment output and CI/lesson records, plus validation/coercion helpers that normalize raw LLM JSON into a canonical EnrichmentResult with typed entity lists.

nodes.name: opencode_sessions.py
nodes.summary: Enrichment pipeline for opencode agent sessions: claims pending segments from the shared agentic queue, builds the prompt, and writes opencode knowledge nodes.

nodes.name: rag.py
nodes.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation core: resolves filters, retrieves and shapes hits, builds the synthesis prompt with payload-cap budgeting, calls the LLM, and formats the answer with scored sources (with degraded-response fallbacks).

nodes.name: redaction.py
nodes.summary: Thin secret-redaction helpers that scrub sensitive substrings from text, iterables, and session segments before storage or enrichment.

nodes.name: retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Hybrid retrieval engine over sqlite-vec + FTS5: semantic/lexical/recent/hybrid search modes, MMR diversification, filter application, and detail hydration into SearchResult objects.

nodes.name: schema_version.py
nodes.summary: Single source of truth for the expected SQLite schema version and the set of schema versions the brain can safely read.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: The brain's main process: a Starlette HTTP app plus the async enrichment orchestrator (BrainServer) that polls all source queues, runs preflight, calls the LLM with retries, writes knowledge nodes, and runs the embedding reaper loop.

nodes.name: telemetry.py
nodes.summary: OpenTelemetry bootstrap gated behind an env var: initializes tracer/meter providers and OTLP exporters, registers process metrics, and exposes no-op-safe helpers (get_tracer, add, hist).

nodes.name: training.py
nodes.summary: Exports enriched knowledge nodes and their source events into JSONL fine-tuning datasets for local model training.

nodes.name: vector_store.py
nodes.summary: Low-level sqlite-vec (vec0) + FTS5 access layer: opens connections with WAL/foreign-keys pragmas, ensures vector tables, guards against embedding-model drift, and performs KNN/FTS search and vector CRUD.

nodes.name: version.py
nodes.summary: Resolves the installed hippo-brain package version via importlib metadata with a fallback.

nodes.name: watchdog.py
nodes.summary: Pre-enrichment safety layer: reaps stale per-row processing locks across all enrichment queues and runs an inference preflight that decides whether/which model to proceed with.

nodes.name: workflow_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Enriches CI workflow runs into knowledge nodes and lesson clusters, correlating shell/claude events and CI annotations into a synthesis prompt (sync and async variants).

nodes.name: aggregate_model_summary
nodes.summary: Aggregates a model's benchmark attempts into a summary record with percentile latencies and metric means.

nodes.name: compute_verdict
nodes.summary: Computes a pass/fail verdict by comparing benchmark gates against configured thresholds.

nodes.name: claim_pending_browser_events
nodes.summary: Atomically claims a batch of pending browser events from the queue, applying scroll-depth/dwell filters and stale-lock recovery.

nodes.name: build_browser_enrichment_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds the LLM enrichment prompt from a chunk of browser events.

nodes.name: get_correlated_browser_events
nodes.summary: Fetches browser events temporally correlated with a shell session window for cross-source context.

nodes.name: write_browser_knowledge_node
nodes.summary: Persists a browser enrichment result as a knowledge node and links it to the source browser events.

nodes.name: SessionSegment
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing one task-boundary segment of a Claude session (prompts, assistant texts, tool calls, timing, lineage).

nodes.name: iter_session_files
nodes.summary: Walks the Claude projects directory yielding SessionFile descriptors, detecting subagent/parent lineage.

nodes.name: extract_segments
nodes.summary: Parses a Claude session JSONL file into task-boundary SessionSegments with redaction and prompt-size capping.

nodes.name: ensure_claude_tables
nodes.summary: Creates the claude_sessions and claude_enrichment_queue tables and indexes if absent.

nodes.name: claim_pending_claude_segments
nodes.summary: Atomically claims pending Claude session segments from the enrichment queue with stale-lock recovery.

nodes.name: write_claude_knowledge_node
nodes.summary: Writes a Claude session enrichment result as a knowledge node linked to its source segments and content hashes.

nodes.name: InferenceClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client for an OpenAI-compatible inference server exposing chat, embed, list_models, and health-check methods.

nodes.name: MockInferenceClient
nodes.summary: Deterministic in-memory stand-in for InferenceClient used in tests, producing reproducible embedding vectors.

nodes.name: embed_knowledge_node
nodes.summary: Embeds a knowledge node's text into the vector store, handling embed-model drift and dimension normalization.

nodes.name: search_similar
nodes.summary: Runs a KNN similarity search against a vector-store column and returns scored matches.

nodes.name: is_enrichment_eligible
nodes.summary: Determines whether a shell event is worth enriching, filtering trivial/ineligible commands.

nodes.name: upsert_entities
nodes.summary: Upserts extracted entities for a knowledge node into the entity tables, keyed by canonical type.

nodes.name: build_enrichment_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds the shell-event enrichment LLM prompt, optionally splicing in correlated browser context.

nodes.name: claim_pending_events_by_session
nodes.summary: Claims pending shell events grouped by session for batch enrichment, with stale-lock recovery.

nodes.name: write_knowledge_node
nodes.summary: Writes a shell enrichment result as a knowledge node and links it to the source events.

nodes.name: canonicalize
nodes.summary: Canonicalizes an entity value by type, stripping worktree prefixes and resolving paths against project roots.

nodes.name: strip_worktree_prefix
nodes.summary: Strips a git-worktree path prefix so worktree and main-tree paths canonicalize identically.

nodes.name: QuestionResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding per-question evaluation outcomes across all retrieval and answer-quality metrics.

nodes.name: score_question
nodes.summary: Scores a single benchmark question by running retrieval (and optional synthesis/judge) and computing all metrics.

nodes.name: run_benchmark
nodes.summary: Runs the full benchmark over a question set, aggregating per-question results into a ScoreReport.

nodes.name: render_markdown
nodes.summary: Renders a ScoreReport into a human-readable Markdown evaluation report.

nodes.name: groundedness
nodes.summary: Uses the inference client to judge how grounded an answer is in its retrieved sources.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that parses args, opens the store, runs the benchmark, and prints the report.

nodes.name: upsert_cluster
nodes.summary: Upserts a CI-failure lesson cluster, bumping occurrences and synthesizing a summary/fix-hint past a threshold.

nodes.name: search_knowledge
nodes.summary: MCP tool: semantic/lexical/hybrid search over knowledge nodes with project/source/branch filters.

nodes.name: ask
nodes.summary: MCP tool: RAG question answering that returns a synthesized answer with scored source references.

nodes.name: search_events
nodes.summary: MCP tool: raw event-history search across shell, Claude, and browser sources.

nodes.name: get_entities
nodes.summary: MCP tool: explores the knowledge graph by entity type and query.

nodes.name: get_ci_status
nodes.summary: MCP tool: returns the latest CI run status, jobs, and annotations for a repo/sha/branch.

nodes.name: get_lessons
nodes.summary: MCP tool: returns clustered CI-failure lessons for a repo/path/tool.

nodes.name: search_hybrid
nodes.summary: MCP tool: hybrid retrieval combining vector and lexical scoring with MMR diversification.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that initializes server state and starts the FastMCP stdio server.

nodes.name: search_knowledge_lexical
nodes.summary: FTS5 lexical search over knowledge nodes with project/since/source/branch filtering.

nodes.name: get_ci_status_impl
nodes.summary: Queries the most recent CI run status, jobs, and annotations for a repo/sha/branch.

nodes.name: get_entities_impl
nodes.summary: SQL implementation backing the get_entities MCP tool, joining entity and knowledge tables.

nodes.name: get_lessons_impl
nodes.summary: SQL implementation backing the get_lessons MCP tool, returning clustered CI-failure lessons.

nodes.name: shape_semantic_results
nodes.summary: Hydrates raw semantic-search hits with knowledge-node detail and links for MCP responses.

nodes.name: EnrichmentResult
nodes.summary: Canonical dataclass for an LLM enrichment output (summary, intent, outcome, entities, tags, decisions).

nodes.name: CIStatus
nodes.summary: Dataclass aggregating a CI run's status, conclusion, timing, and per-job results.

nodes.name: Lesson
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a clustered CI-failure lesson with occurrence counts and fix hints.

nodes.name: validate_enrichment_data
nodes.summary: Validates and coerces raw LLM JSON into a typed EnrichmentResult, normalizing entity lists.

nodes.name: claim_pending_opencode_segments
nodes.summary: Atomically claims pending opencode segments from the shared agentic enrichment queue with stale-lock recovery.

nodes.name: write_opencode_knowledge_node
nodes.summary: Writes an opencode enrichment result as a knowledge node linked to its source segments.

nodes.name: build_opencode_enrichment_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds the LLM enrichment prompt from a batch of opencode session segments.

nodes.name: ask
nodes.summary: Core RAG pipeline: preflight, retrieval, prompt budgeting, LLM synthesis, and formatted answer with degraded fallbacks.

nodes.name: _build_rag_prompt
nodes.summary: Builds the synthesis prompt from retrieved hits within a max-character budget.

nodes.name: format_rag_response
nodes.summary: Formats a RAG result into the response shape with scored source references.

nodes.name: _allocate_payload_caps
nodes.summary: Distributes a per-hit character budget across embed/command/design-decision payloads.

nodes.name: redact_segment_secrets
nodes.summary: Redacts secrets from all text fields of a session segment before storage or enrichment.

nodes.name: SearchResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a hydrated retrieval hit (uuid, score, summary, entities, design decisions, lineage).

nodes.name: _Backend
nodes.summary: Protocol abstracting the vector-store backend (knn_search/fts_search) so retrieval is testable.

nodes.name: search
nodes.summary: Top-level retrieval dispatcher selecting semantic/lexical/recent/hybrid mode and applying filters.

nodes.name: _hybrid
nodes.summary: Hybrid retrieval combining KNN and FTS candidates, re-scored and merged.

nodes.name: _apply_filters
nodes.summary: Applies project/since/source/branch/entity filters to a candidate set of node ids.

nodes.name: _fetch_details
nodes.summary: Hydrates node ids into full SearchResult detail rows from the knowledge tables.

nodes.name: _mmr
nodes.summary: Maximal-marginal-relevance re-ranking to diversify retrieved results.

nodes.name: BrainServer
nodes.summary: The brain's HTTP-app + async enrichment orchestrator: serves query endpoints and runs the polling enrichment and embedding-reaper loops across all sources.

nodes.name: create_app
nodes.summary: Factory that constructs a BrainServer, wires OTel queue-depth gauges, and returns the Starlette app with enrichment lifespan hooks.

nodes.name: _collect_queue_depths
nodes.summary: Collects pending/processing/failed queue-depth counts per source for metrics and health.

nodes.name: init_telemetry
nodes.summary: Initializes OpenTelemetry tracer/meter providers and OTLP exporters when telemetry is enabled.

nodes.name: _register_process_metrics
nodes.summary: Registers observable gauges for process-level CPU/memory/thread metrics.

nodes.name: export_training_data
nodes.summary: Exports enriched knowledge nodes and source events into JSONL fine-tuning datasets.

nodes.name: check_embed_model_drift
nodes.summary: Detects whether the live embedding model differs from the stored one and raises/switches accordingly.

nodes.name: knn_search
nodes.summary: Runs a vec0 KNN search over a vector column and returns nearest knowledge nodes.

nodes.name: fts_search
nodes.summary: Runs an FTS5 full-text search over knowledge-node text.

nodes.name: insert_vectors
nodes.summary: Inserts knowledge and command embedding vectors for a node into the vec0 tables.

nodes.name: reap_stale_locks
nodes.summary: Releases per-row processing locks held longer than the timeout across all enrichment queues.

nodes.name: preflight_inference
nodes.summary: Checks inference-server reachability and loaded models, returning a decision on whether/which model to use.

nodes.name: PreflightDecision
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing the outcome of an inference preflight (proceed flag, reason, loaded models).

nodes.name: enrich_one_async
nodes.summary: Async enrichment of one CI workflow run into a knowledge node and lesson clusters, correlating events and annotations.

nodes.name: enrich_one
nodes.summary: Synchronous enrichment of one CI workflow run into a knowledge node and lesson clusters.

nodes.name: claim_pending_workflow_runs
nodes.summary: Claims pending CI workflow runs from the workflow enrichment queue with stale-lock recovery.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker that makes brain/tests an importable Python package for the pytest test suite.
nodes.languageNotes: Empty __init__.py serving only to mark the tests directory as a package.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Shared pytest fixtures for the brain test suite, providing a temporary schema-initialized SQLite database and a canned mock inference response.
nodes.languageNotes: pytest conftest.py: fixtures defined here are auto-discovered by all sibling test modules without explicit import.

nodes.name: tmp_db
nodes.summary: Pytest fixture that creates a temporary SQLite database initialized from the project schema (with WAL pragmas) and cleans up the db plus its -wal/-shm sidecars on teardown.

nodes.name: eval_questions.json
nodes.summary: Labeled evaluation dataset of questions with a schema descriptor, used as ground-truth fixtures for retrieval/RAG quality benchmarks.

nodes.name: expected_scores.json
nodes.summary: Golden expected retrieval scores (per-mode ranks by QA id) that the golden-corpus regression tests assert against to catch ranking drift.

nodes.name: qa.jsonl
nodes.summary: JSONL question-answer fixture (one record per line) backing the golden-corpus retrieval benchmark.

nodes.name: test_backfill_git_repo.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the git-repo backfill utility: parsing owner/repo from remote URLs, resolving the repo for a working directory, and the idempotent NULL-only DB update path with SQLite pragma verification.

nodes.name: _make_db
nodes.summary: Test helper that builds a temporary SQLite events table seeded with rows used by the backfill run tests.

nodes.name: test_run_sets_sqlite_pragmas
nodes.summary: Verifies the backfill run opens its SQLite connection with the required pragmas by injecting a tracking connection wrapper and asserting on captured PRAGMA statements.

nodes.name: test_bench_cli.py
nodes.summary: Tests the bench command-line interface: help/argument surfaces for run, corpus, and determinism subcommands, and the documented exit codes (0/1/2/3) for passing, regression, preflight-abort, and all-models-errored runs.

nodes.name: test_cli_run_dry_run_invokes_orchestrate
nodes.summary: Asserts that a dry-run CLI invocation forwards the parsed arguments into orchestrate and returns its OrchestrationResult, capturing the call arguments via a fake orchestrate.

nodes.name: test_cli_summary_renders_run_file
nodes.summary: Writes a synthetic run JSONL file and verifies the summary subcommand renders it to stdout without error.

nodes.name: test_bench_config.py
nodes.summary: Tests bench path resolution and configuration: XDG-respecting root directory, corpus path layout, lazy creation of the runs directory, default thresholds, and BenchConfig round-trip serialization.

nodes.name: test_bench_coordinator.py
nodes.summary: Exercises the per-model bench coordinator lifecycle: guaranteed teardown across spawn/wait/drain/self-consistency/proxy failures, queue-drain behavior on missing or full tables, and structured error capture for the full single-model run.

nodes.name: _patch_lifecycle
nodes.summary: Central test helper that monkeypatches every stage of the coordinator lifecycle (spawn, wait-for-ready, drain, self-consistency, downstream proxy) with configurable failure injection, returning the mocks for assertion.

nodes.name: test_smoke_run_one_model_full_lifecycle
nodes.summary: End-to-end smoke test that runs a single model through the full coordinator lifecycle with all stages stubbed and asserts the happy-path ordering and result shape.

nodes.name: test_bench_corpus.py
nodes.summary: Tests deterministic corpus sampling across shell/Claude/browser/workflow sources: time-bucket coverage, per-source minimum floor, SQLite/JSONL equivalence, schema-version stamping, tamper detection, overwrite protection, probe-tag exclusion, and enrichment-queue seeding.

nodes.name: _seed_full_corpus
nodes.summary: Test helper that seeds a SQLite database with a balanced set of shell, Claude session, browser, and workflow records across all sources for corpus sampling tests.

nodes.name: test_sqlite_jsonl_equivalence
nodes.summary: Verifies that the corpus exported to SQLite and to JSONL produce equivalent sampled records, guarding the two persistence formats against drift.

nodes.name: test_probe_tag_excluded
nodes.summary: Ensures synthetic probe-tagged events are excluded from the sampled corpus, enforcing the capture-reliability anti-pattern that probes never reach user-facing data.

nodes.name: test_bench_determinism.py
nodes.summary: Tests the determinism gate that compares MRR and hit@1 metrics across repeated bench runs, asserting pass/fail on stability budgets, shared-model requirements, nested mode extraction, and missing-metric handling.

nodes.name: _summary_row
nodes.summary: Test helper that builds a synthetic per-model summary record with configurable MRR, hit@1, and mode fields for feeding the determinism comparator.

nodes.name: test_bench_downstream_proxy.py
nodes.summary: Tests the downstream retrieval proxy scoring: QA loading with missing-event filtering, hit@1/hit@5/not-found scoring, nDCG computation, mean-MRR mode aggregation, and ask-synthesis keyword hit/miss with deterministic sampling.

nodes.name: test_mode_aggregation_mean_mrr
nodes.summary: Verifies that per-QA reciprocal-rank scores aggregate to the correct mean MRR across a retrieval mode.

nodes.name: test_bench_e2e.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end integration test that seeds a minimal full-schema database, builds a real corpus, and runs the bench pipeline (coordinator + corpus + orchestrate + output) to confirm the components compose cleanly.

nodes.name: _seed_minimal_full_schema
nodes.summary: Test helper that seeds a SQLite database with the minimal rows across the full hippo schema needed to drive an end-to-end bench run.

nodes.name: test_e2e_bench_run_composes_cleanly
nodes.summary: Drives a full bench run against a real seeded corpus and asserts the orchestrated pipeline produces a well-formed output without component integration errors.

nodes.name: test_bench_enrich_call.py
nodes.summary: Tests the bench enrichment call wrapper: prompt construction per source, timing/raw capture on success, and structured recording of timeout, HTTP error, 5xx, and response-parse-error failure modes, plus the embedding call path.

nodes.name: test_bench_gates.py
nodes.summary: Tests the enrichment quality gates: JSON schema validity with fence/preamble recovery, refusal detection, trivial/empty summary flagging, echo-similarity, entity sanity checks, and self-consistency via mean pairwise cosine.

nodes.name: test_self_consistency_score_aggregates_per_event
nodes.summary: Verifies the self-consistency score correctly aggregates mean pairwise cosine similarity of repeated enrichment embeddings per event.

nodes.name: test_bench_golden.py
nodes.summary: Tests the golden-corpus retrieval regression: loads the QA fixture, stubs search with controlled rankings, asserts expected scores match, and confirms a deliberate rank regression is caught.

nodes.name: test_bench_lms.py
nodes.summary: Tests the LM Studio (lms) CLI adapter: binary-availability checks, JSON parsing of loaded models, and load/unload/unload-all command invocation, all via subprocess stubs.

nodes.name: test_bench_metrics.py
nodes.summary: Tests the resource-metrics sampler: snapshot shape, locating the inference process, peak aggregation, and latest-sample retrieval including the empty-history case.

nodes.name: test_bench_orchestrate.py
nodes.summary: Tests the multi-model bench orchestrator: dry-run manifest-then-run-end emission, output directory creation, isolation of a failing model from the rest, and the no-models run-end-with-reason path.

nodes.name: test_orchestrate_isolates_failing_model
nodes.summary: Verifies that when one model raises during orchestration the failure is isolated and the remaining models still run to completion.

nodes.name: test_bench_output.py
nodes.summary: Tests the bench output record serialization (run manifest, attempt, model summary, run-end) and the JSONL writer's behavior: manifest-first ordering, append semantics, and overwrite of an existing run file.

nodes.name: test_writer_appends_records
nodes.summary: Verifies the output writer appends successive records to the run JSONL file in order without clobbering earlier entries.

nodes.name: test_bench_pause_recovery.py
nodes.summary: Tests the pause/resume lockfile lifecycle: lockfile written on pause and removed on resume (even if resume-post fails), stale-lockfile recovery, corrupt-lockfile fallback, and orphan-tmp cleanup when writes raise.

nodes.name: test_recover_resumes_when_stale_lockfile_present
nodes.summary: Verifies recovery resumes a previously paused bench run when a stale lockfile is found on startup.

nodes.name: test_bench_pause_rpc.py
nodes.summary: Tests the brain server pause/resume RPC endpoints: 200 responses with paused_at/resumed_at, in-flight enrichment reporting, idempotency, health-endpoint state reflection, and clearing enrichment-active on cancellation.

nodes.name: test_enrichment_active_cleared_on_cancellation
nodes.summary: Verifies the enrichment-active flag is cleared when an in-flight enrichment task is cancelled, preventing a stuck paused state.

nodes.name: _make_app
nodes.summary: Test helper that constructs the brain server app instance bound to a temporary database for exercising pause/resume RPC endpoints.

nodes.name: test_bench_preflight.py
nodes.summary: Tests the bench preflight checks: serializable check results, inference-reachability pass/fail, disk-space pass/fail with missing-path parent resolution, and run-all aborting when the corpus is missing.

nodes.name: test_bench_pretty.py
nodes.summary: Tests the human-readable summary renderer for bench run files: manifest-only rendering, per-model rows, and graceful handling of missing numeric fields.

nodes.name: test_bench_prod_config.py
nodes.summary: Tests reading the brain port from the production config.toml: default fallbacks, malformed/unreadable TOML warnings, port type and range validation, scalar-vs-table key handling, and XDG_CONFIG_HOME precedence.

nodes.name: test_xdg_config_home_precedence
nodes.summary: Verifies that XDG_CONFIG_HOME takes precedence over the default config location when resolving the production config path.

nodes.name: test_bench_runner.py
nodes.summary: Unit test verifying the bench runner's self-consistency mode embeds each generated output during a benchmark pass.

nodes.name: test_bench_schemas.py
nodes.summary: Validates the bench JSON schemas for all four enrichment sources (shell, claude, browser, workflow), asserting canonical payloads pass and malformed ones are rejected.

nodes.name: test_bench_shadow_stack.py
nodes.summary: Extensive tests for the bench shadow-stack process orchestrator: subprocess env injection, isolated TMPDIR/XDG, process-group spawn/teardown (SIGTERM then SIGKILL), and brain-readiness waiting.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of monkeypatched Popen capture and real-subprocess integration tests to assert process-group lifecycle and tmpdir cleanup.

nodes.name: test_bench_summary.py
nodes.summary: Tests bench result aggregation (schema-validity rate, latency percentiles, entity sanity) and pass/fail verdict gating including self-consistency handling.

nodes.name: test_bench_telemetry_isolation.py
nodes.summary: Verifies bench subprocesses receive isolated OTel resource attributes (namespace, run id, model id) so benchmark telemetry never bleeds into production traces.

nodes.name: test_browser_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: Covers the browser enrichment pipeline: claiming pending browser events, time-gap chunking, prompt building, correlated-event lookup, knowledge-node writes, queue failure handling, and the dwell-time filter.

nodes.name: test_claude_sessions.py
nodes.summary: Tests Claude session ingestion: iterating session JSONL files, extracting task-boundary segments, prompt building, idempotent insert/claim, table creation, eligibility filtering, and content-hash propagation.

nodes.name: test_client.py
nodes.summary: Tests the mock inference client (chat, deterministic embeddings, reachability) and the embed-response parser's rejection of null floats in vectors.

nodes.name: test_client_real.py
nodes.summary: Tests the real HTTP inference client against mocked responses: chat/embed parsing, HTTP error surfacing, crash-counter increment heuristics, reachability checks, and init normalization.

nodes.name: test_dedup_entities.py
nodes.summary: Tests the entity-dedup maintenance script (loaded dynamically): rebranding polluted worktree path names, merging duplicate groups, canonical-swap collision handling, and dry-run safety.

nodes.name: test_embed_drift.py
nodes.summary: Tests embedding-model drift detection: blocking writes when the stored embed model changes, allowing an explicit switch flag, recording the model after writes, and vector-dimension mismatch errors.

nodes.name: test_embeddings.py
nodes.summary: Tests embedding generation and vector search: embed-and-search round trips, multi-node search, node-id requirement, unknown-column rejection, and single-item embed call batching.

nodes.name: test_embeddings_extended.py
nodes.summary: Supplementary embedding tests covering idempotent table creation and the pad-or-truncate vector helper across pad, truncate, and exact-length cases.

nodes.name: test_enrichment.py
nodes.summary: The brain's largest enrichment test suite: prompt building, response parsing (entities, env vars, design decisions, domains), claim/write transactions, rollback safety, entity upsert worktree stripping, and per-source eligibility filters.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a fault-injecting connection wrapper (_FailingConn) to assert transactional rollback leaves no partial knowledge-node state.

nodes.name: test_enrichment_extended.py
nodes.summary: Additional enrichment tests for git-repo prompt fields, empty-queue claims, stale processing-lock reclamation, and empty/non-dict entity handling on knowledge-node writes.

nodes.name: test_entity_resolver.py
nodes.summary: Tests the entity resolver's canonicalization: non-path normalization, path-type canonicalization, project-root fallback chain, worktree-prefix stripping, and worktree-fragment dedup merging.

nodes.name: test_entity_taxonomy.py
nodes.summary: Introspects the enrichment module's entity-type maps to assert every entity type is classified exactly once and the classification tuples are disjoint.

nodes.name: test_evaluation.py
nodes.summary: Tests retrieval-evaluation metrics (recall@k, MRR, nDCG, source diversity, near-duplicate density, coverage gap, coherence) plus groundedness scoring and an end-to-end smoke evaluation.

nodes.name: test_evaluation_extended.py
nodes.summary: Supplementary evaluation tests for nDCG zero-ideal, source-diversity empty strings, undersized near-dup density, pairwise cosine sampling, source derivation across link tables, and degraded retrieval results.

nodes.name: test_init.py
nodes.summary: Tests the hippo_brain package entry point: usage/error output on bad args, the serve and enrich command dispatch, and runtime-settings loading (rejecting the legacy lmstudio section, reading the inference section).

nodes.name: test_integration_sqlite_vec.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests over a real sqlite-vec database: all search modes return valid shapes/scores, hybrid project filtering requires a link, semantic results expose uuids and linked events, and RAG ask degrades gracefully on chat timeout.

nodes.name: test_lessons.py
nodes.summary: Tests the lessons promotion logic: first occurrence creates no lesson, second promotes and clears pending, third increments, and the minimum-occurrences-of-3 threshold.

nodes.name: test_lessons_graduation_hippo.py
nodes.summary: Tests that hippo's own recurring CI failures graduate into lessons via cluster upserts, and documents the not-yet-wired hippo-incident ingestion pipeline as a skipped placeholder.

nodes.name: test_mcp_logging.py
nodes.summary: Minimal tests verifying the MCP server's logging setup creates a logger and writes to stderr (keeping stdout clean for the stdio transport).

nodes.name: test_mcp_queries.py
nodes.summary: Tests the MCP query layer: since-parsing, lexical knowledge search, event search with branches, entity retrieval and filters, knowledge filters, project listing, semantic-result shaping, and context-block formatting.

nodes.name: test_self_consistency_pass_embeds_each_output
nodes.summary: Asserts that a self-consistency benchmark pass calls the embed function once per generated output sample.

nodes.name: test_shell_schema_accepts_canonical_payload
nodes.summary: Verifies the bench shell schema accepts a fully-formed canonical shell enrichment payload.

nodes.name: test_claude_schema_accepts_canonical_payload
nodes.summary: Verifies the bench claude schema accepts a canonical Claude session enrichment payload.

nodes.name: _capture_popen_calls
nodes.summary: Test helper that monkeypatches subprocess.Popen to record spawn args/kwargs for assertions about env injection and process-group setup.

nodes.name: test_env_injection_isolates_tmpdir
nodes.summary: Asserts the shadow stack injects an isolated TMPDIR into spawned subprocesses so benchmark runs do not share temp state.

nodes.name: test_daemon_dead_after_spawn_raises_with_log_path
nodes.summary: Asserts that if the daemon dies right after spawn, the shadow stack raises an error that includes the log path for diagnosis.

nodes.name: test_brain_spawn_failure_kills_daemon_pgrp
nodes.summary: Asserts that a brain spawn failure tears down the already-started daemon process group to avoid orphaned processes.

nodes.name: test_teardown_sigterm_then_sigkill
nodes.summary: Verifies teardown escalates from SIGTERM to SIGKILL on the process group when graceful termination does not complete.

nodes.name: test_cleanup_tmpdir_logs_leaks_via_onexc
nodes.summary: Asserts tmpdir cleanup uses the rmtree onexc callback to log leaked files rather than crashing teardown.

nodes.name: test_spawn_pgrp_pair_with_real_subprocesses
nodes.summary: Integration test spawning a real daemon/brain process-group pair and asserting correct lifecycle and teardown.

nodes.name: _attempt
